commit_scope: Load the seedbank Blueprint symbol section for markdown and YAML meaning-ingestion bands so DOC-* and YAML-* constructors resolve through the registered symbol table instead of failing at runtime.

commands: COORD_AGENT=codex@a3ec ./scripts/agent-coord.sh claim "markdown/yaml source-ingestion constructor residual after PR #2978: DOC-DOC and YAML-PAIR unbound, avoiding go-jit TypeScript/BMF lanes"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/seedbank/blueprint-symbol-sections.fk form-stdlib/seedbank/grammars/markdown.fk form-stdlib/tests/markdown-meaning-ingestion-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/seedbank/blueprint-symbol-sections.fk form-stdlib/seedbank/grammars/yaml.fk form-stdlib/tests/yaml-meaning-ingestion-band.fk
git fetch origin main && git rebase --autostash origin/main
local_validation.notes: The focused markdown and YAML meaning-ingestion validations both return 1000 with 1 ok / 0 divergent across Go, Rust, and TypeScript. Full validation remains diagnostic rc=1 because two unrelated rows remain divergent after the BML route-choice, production route-choice, oracle-catalog, and recipe registry receipt floors merged, but markdown-meaning-ingestion-band.fk and yaml-meaning-ingestion-band.fk are now passing. The measured combined floor is fourth arm: 117 band(s) four-way, 549 ok, 2 divergent. These source-ingestion bands remain outside the fourth-arm manifest because they depend on read_file/source-compiler and the host/source-ingestion family; the fourth-arm floor itself is unchanged by this slice while total passing workloads rise by two. Wellness surfaced stale generated indexes after origin/main moved; scripts/generate_repo_indexes.py refreshed the seven generated index artifacts and the follow-up --check passed. The post-rebase local PR guard reported local_preflight=pass and check_pr_followthrough reported codex_open_prs=0 / stale_codex_prs=0. CI then exposed a current-main runtime-surface parser gap after PR #2982 moved mutation routes into a referenced helper; scripts/runtime_surface_report.py now expands referenced zero-arg route-list helpers and api/tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py pins that shape.

ci_validation.notes: Pending PR creation and GitHub checks.

commands: No public HTTP behavior change is expected; this is a Form validation/prelude correction.
deploy_validation.notes: The change affects local Form suite validation only.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; CI, merge, and deploy validation are pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Markdown and YAML meaning ingestion now load the registered seedbank Blueprint symbol section before their grammars, so DOC-DOC, DOC-HEADING, DOC-PARAGRAPH, DOC-CODE-BLOCK, YAML-DOC, YAML-PAIR, and YAML-ITEM resolve consistently. On the post-PR #2989 origin/main floor, full Form validation records 117 fourth-arm bands, 549 ok, and 2 divergent rows; this slice contributes the two source-ingestion passes and leaves unrelated residuals named.
public_endpoints: local-only: Form source-ingestion validation; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Focused markdown meaning-ingestion proof returns 1000 across Go/Rust/TypeScript.
Focused YAML meaning-ingestion proof returns 1000 across Go/Rust/TypeScript.
Full validate records the combined raised total passing workload floor and the two remaining unrelated divergent rows.
Runtime-surface native-route parser test passes and confirms helper-spliced method routes such as POST /api/ideas stay visible.
known_full_suite_gaps: go-jit-band.fk: TypeScript source parse error unexpected token rparen at 5344
